meta.title: Bathroom Remodeling Los Angeles | AM Builds – 15% OFF
meta.description: AM Builds offers premium bathroom remodeling in Los Angeles. 5-star rated, licensed & insured. 15% OFF first project for new clients.

offer.headline: Save 15% on Your First Project
offer.details: Free estimate included · No pressure, no obligation
offer.terms: Valid for new clients on first project only. Cannot be combined with other offers.

hero.heading: Your Dream Bathroom Starts Here.
hero.subheading: Transform your outdated bathroom into a custom, luxury space built to last. Premium craftsmanship. Zero shortcuts. Honest pricing.

lead_form.title: Get Your Free Quote
lead_form.subtitle: 60 seconds · No commitment · We call within 24 hrs
lead_form.privacy_note: We never share your info. No spam, ever.

gallery.label: Modern Master Suite
gallery.sub: Hex tile · Freestanding tub · Glass enclosure

services.name: Full Bathroom Renovations
services.desc: Complete transformations from top to bottom — new layout, fixtures, tile, lighting, and finishes.

services.name: Shower & Tub Installations
services.desc: Walk-in showers, freestanding tubs, and custom wet areas built for everyday luxury.

services.name: Custom Tile & Flooring
services.desc: Precision tile work in any pattern — from classic subway to large-format porcelain slabs.

services.name: Vanities & Storage
services.desc: New vanity installations that maximize storage and elevate the overall look and feel.

services.name: Fixtures & Hardware
services.desc: Faucets, towel bars, mirrors, and finishing details that make your bathroom cohesive.

services.name: Lighting & Finishes
services.desc: Recessed lighting, vanity mirrors, accent fixtures — upgrades that transform how your bathroom feels.

why_us.title: Hands-On Ownership
why_us.desc: Owners directly involved in every project — not salespeople handing off to unknown crews.

why_us.title: Clear Written Estimates
why_us.desc: Detailed scope, realistic timeline, and honest pricing before any work begins.

why_us.title: Zero Shortcuts Policy
why_us.desc: If it's worth doing, it's worth doing right the first time. No rushed jobs, no inferior materials.

why_us.title: Spotless Job Sites
why_us.desc: We treat your home with respect — clean, organized, and professional throughout every stage.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: AM Builds completely transformed our master bathroom. The tile work was flawless, timeline accurate, and the team was respectful throughout. Worth every penny.

testimonials.name: Carlos T.
testimonials.text: From the first phone call to the final walkthrough, communication was excellent. They stayed on budget, on schedule, and quality exceeded expectations.

testimonials.name: Jennifer L.
testimonials.text: They helped with design decisions without being pushy. The shower is stunning. Clean work, great crew, and they left my home immaculate every single day.

descriptions: AM Builds delivers premium bathroom remodeling in LA. 5-star rated, licensed & insured. Get your free estimate today.
Save 15% on your first bathroom remodel. Transparent pricing, skilled craftsmanship, zero shortcuts. Call (818) 619-1535.
